reports.pageIntro: Generate reports on invoices, VAT, payments and platform usage.

preview.title: Report preview
preview.subtitle: Review the criteria and report content before downloading.

ordinary.empty: No filters selected. All available data is included.
ordinary.footer: Document generated using the criteria above.

invoiceEdition.empty: No invoices found for the selected criteria.

invoiceNormalization.empty: No normalized invoices found for the selected criteria.

payments.empty: No payments found for the selected criteria.

vatCollection.empty: No rows found for the selected criteria.

toolUsage.empty: No rows found for the selected criteria.

invoiceEdition.title: Invoice editing report
invoiceEdition.description: Analysis of created or updated invoices. Filter by client, contract, period, point of sale and status.

invoiceNormalization.title: Invoice normalization report
invoiceNormalization.description: Track normalized invoices. Filter by point of sale, type (FV, FA, …) and period.

invoicePayments.title: Invoice payments report
invoicePayments.description: Summary of payments recorded over the period and by client.

vatCollection.title: VAT collection report
vatCollection.description: Collected VAT amounts. Filter by period, payment status, invoice type and client.

toolUsage.title: Tool usage report
toolUsage.description: User activity and feature usage over the selected period.

list.intro: History of generated ordinary reports. Click the button below to generate a new one.
list.loadError: Could not load the report list.

generate.intro: Choose the report type and fill in the available filters before generating the preview.

reportXDaily.title: Daily report
reportXDaily.description: Summary since the last Z report. Accumulated values are not reset.
includes: Trade name, tax ID, date and time
Total, taxable amounts and amounts per tax group
Invoice count by type, payment methods, discounts

reportZ.title: Closing report
reportZ.description: Closing summary since the last Z report. Resets accumulated values.
includes: Trade name, tax ID, date and time
Total, taxable amounts and amounts per tax group
Invoice count by type, payment methods, discounts

reportXPeriodic.title: Periodic report
reportXPeriodic.description: Summary for the selected period. Does not reset accumulated values.
includes: Trade name, tax ID, selected period
Total, taxable amounts and amounts per tax group
Invoice count by type, payment methods, discounts

generate.intro: Choose the X-Z report type to generate.
